data.title: Tradr ETFs to launch first-to-market leveraged ETFs on CLSK, COHR, and LEU. Sophisticated investors and traders targeted.
data.description: Tradr ETFs, a leading provider of ETFs catering to experienced investors and professional traders, has revealed plans to introduce three groundbreaking strategies that will offer early access to high-growth stocks. This move positions Tradr ETFs as a pioneer in the market, emphasizing innovation and a forward-thinking approach. The company anticipates unveiling these unique single stock leveraged opportunities to the investing community amid a rapidly evolving financial landscape.

data.title: CenCore secures $44 million contract from Department of War to develop modular buildings with NIWC Atlantic.
data.description: CenCore, a company based in SPRINGVILLE, Utah, has joined forces with the Naval Information Warfare Center Atlantic (NIWC Atlantic) to enhance the Defense Industrial Base (DIB). Through a collaboration with the Department of War (DOW), CenCore has been awarded a substantial $44 million contract for this initiative.

data.title: Taltz and Zepbound combo in Phase 3b trial shows superior efficacy for psoriasis patients with obesity or overweight.
data.description: Results from the TOGETHER-PsO study at 36 weeks showed that the combination of Taltz and Zepbound met the primary endpoint by demonstrating superiority over Taltz monotherapy in achieving complete skin clearance (PASI 100) and at least 10% weight loss. In a significant secondary endpoint, patients receiving Taltz and Zepbound were 40% more likely to achieve...

data.title: MakeMyTrip collaborates with OpenAI to enhance AI capabilities, aiming to improve travel discovery with over 50,000 conversations daily.
data.description: MakeMyTrip Limited announced a collaboration with OpenAI to enhance its AI capabilities for travel discovery. The integration of OpenAI's APIs into its app will facilitate seamless transition from inspiration to booking for users. MakeMyTrip's Myra interface handles over 50,000 conversations daily in multiple languages, catering to a large user base, especially in Tier-2 and smaller cities. This move aims to improve user engagement and strengthen the company's position in the travel industry. The initiative aligns with MakeMyTrip's growth strategy by leveraging AI to streamline travel planning and boost customer engagement. The stock (NASDAQ: MMYT) is currently facing a bearish trend.

data.title: Sonic Automotive beats Q4 earnings with EPS of $1.52 (above estimate of $1.51), revenue down $24.70M vs last year.
data.description: Sonic Automotive (NYSE: SAH) released its fourth-quarter earnings on February 18, 2026, at 06:45 AM. The earnings report revealed that Sonic Automotive surpassed estimated earnings by 0.66%, with an EPS of $1.52 compared to the expected $1.51. However, revenue experienced a decline of $24.70 million from the corresponding period in the previous year. In the previous quarter, the company fell short on EPS. For a detailed analysis, the complete story can be accessed on Benzinga.com.

data.title: OneSpaWorld Hldgs (NASDAQ: OSW) posted Q4 earnings: EPS $0.24 (missed estimate by -4.0%), revenue increased by $24.89M.
data.description: OneSpaWorld Holdings, trading on NASDAQ under OSW, released its Q4 earnings report on February 18, 2026, at 06:45 AM. The company fell short of estimated earnings by -4.0%, with an EPS of $0.24 compared to an expected $0.25. Revenue saw an increase of $24.89 million from the previous year. For more details on their past earnings performance, the company's report is available on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Merck and Mayo Clinic partner for AI drug discovery, precision medicine research agreement.
data.description: Merck and Mayo Clinic have partnered in a Research and Development agreement based in Rahway, New Jersey, and Rochester, Minnesota. The collaboration aims to utilize artificial intelligence (AI), advanced analytics, and data to enhance drug discovery processes.

data.title: HF Sinclair partners with UPOP Holdings to form Green Trail Fuels, adding 30 retail sites in CO and NM, boosting market presence.
data.description: A company, HF Sinclair Corporation (NYSE: DINO), has introduced a new joint venture named Green Trail Fuels, LLC, with UPOP Holdings. HF Sinclair will possess a 50% non-operating economic stake in the partnership, including 30 retail locations in Colorado and New Mexico. The agreement will see HF Sinclair providing fuel from its regional refineries to enhance its branded marketing reach in the area.

data.title: Grafted Polyolefins market set to reach $5.98 billion by 2030, with various applications across industries.
data.description: In Delray Beach, Florida, a recent report by MarketsandMarkets indicates significant growth in the Grafted Polyolefins Market. The market is segmented by type, including Maleic Anhydride Grafted PE, PP, and EVA, catering to various applications such as Adhesion Promotion and Compatibilization. The key industries benefiting from this market are Automotive, Packaging, and Construction. The report also covers different processing technologies involved in the market's operations. This data provides valuable insights for stakeholders looking to capitalize on these trends.

data.title: Feb 2026: QuickBooks named top accounting software for UK freelancers by Consumer365 for HMRC; tool for tax prep.
data.description: On February 18, 2026, Consumer365 released its recent yearly evaluation of accounting software for sole proprietors, freelancers, and small business operators in the United Kingdom. The review named QuickBooks as a top digital solution for handling HMRC Self Assessment and tax management.

data.title: Costamare Q4 earnings miss estimates, reporting EPS of $0.6 (vs $0.71), revenue down $231.19M from last year.
data.description: Costamare (NYSE: CMRE) disclosed its Q4 financial results on February 18, 2026, at 06:34 AM. Despite missing estimated earnings by -15.49%, reporting an EPS of $0.6 compared to the expected $0.71, they beat on EPS by $0.11 previously. Their revenue dropped by $231.19 million from the previous year's same period. For more details, the full article can be found on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Ternium (TX) Q4 earnings missed estimates by -19.48% with EPS $0.62 vs. $0.77 expected, revenue down $101M YoY.
data.description: Ternium (NYSE: TX) released their Q4 earnings on Wednesday, February 18, 2026, at 06:30 AM. The earnings report revealed that Ternium missed estimated earnings by -19.48%, with an EPS of $0.62 compared to the estimated $0.77. Revenue also saw a decline of $101.00 million from the previous year. For a more detailed account, including a historical earnings summary, the complete article can be found on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Magna Mining reports high-grade copper and precious metals from Levack Mine in Sudbury, Ontario, including mineralization over 300m extent.
data.description: Magna Mining Inc. has provided an update on exploration activities at the Levack Mine in Sudbury Basin, Canada. The company has released results from five diamond drill holes targeting the footwall environment, including the R2 Zone, and other priority targets. The drilling has revealed veins containing high-grade copper, platinum, palladium, gold, and silver over a vertical extent of about 300 metres and 150 metres north-south. The R2 Zone remains open for further exploration towards the No. 3 Footwall Zone, at depth, and to the southwest towards the Morrison Footwall Cu-PGE Deposit. These findings showcase the potential for significant mineral deposits at the Levack Mine.

data.title: OneSpaWorld had record results in Q4 and fiscal year 2025. Stock ticker: OSW. CEO pleased with the performance.
data.description: NASSAU, Bahamas--OneSpaWorld Holdings Limited (NASDAQ: OSW) shared its financial results for Q4 and fiscal year 2025, ending on December 31, 2025. As a leading global provider of health and wellness services on cruise ships and resorts worldwide, the Company reported exceptional performance. Leonard Fluxman, Executive Chairman and CEO, expressed satisfaction with the record-breaking Q4 and highlighted the successful year. OSW continues to excel in its industry, delivering top-notch services to customers globally.

data.title: Sonic Automotive reports Q4 2025 revenue at $3.9B, down 1%, gross profit at $598.7M, up 4%, net income at $46.9M.
data.description: Charlotte-based Sonic Automotive, Inc., a major automotive retailer, announced its financial results for the fourth quarter and fiscal year ending December 31, 2025. In Q4 2025, the company recorded total revenues of $3.9 billion, reflecting a 1% decrease compared to the previous year. However, they achieved a record total gross profit of $598.7 million in the fourth quarter, showcasing a 4% increase year-over-year. Sonic reported a net income of $46.9 million for the period, showing a decrease from the previous year.

An avalanche hit a ski resort in the Swiss region of Zermatt, Valais on Tuesday as local authorities issued an alert due to the high avalanche danger. The highest avalanche warning of level 5 was issued, although this was lowered to level 4 on Wednesday.

data.title: Taylor Morrison rebrands to "Homes Built for Real Life," focusing on everyday moments. NYSE: TMHC. (94 chars)
data.description: Taylor Morrison, a leading home builder in America, recently launched a new brand platform called Homes Built for Real Life, which aims to celebrate the everyday moments in a home. The platform was introduced on February 18, 2026, in Scottsdale, Arizona. Taylor Morrison, listed as NYSE: TMHC, is recognized as America's Most Trusted Home Builder. Their initiative emphasizes the importance of embracing the imperfections and realities of daily life at home. This endeavor signifies a shift towards promoting authenticity and practicality in home living experiences.

data.title: Wayfinder's Camp Bloomfield staff address parents' concerns for blind/visually impaired youth/teen session (ages 7-17).
data.description: In Los Angeles on February 18, 2026, the staff at Wayfinder's Camp Bloomfield have revealed the most frequently asked questions and worries from parents as the registration cutoff for this summer nears. The camp's youth/teen program is tailored for kids between 7 and 17 years old who are either blind or have visual impairments.

data.title: Hyperproof introduces Hierarchical Scopes to aid enterprises in expanding compliance; streamlining operations without extra manual effort.
data.description: Today, in Bellevue, Wash., Hyperproof, the leading GRC platform, introduced Hierarchical Scopes as part of its latest update on Feb. 18, 2026. This new feature brings a multi-level structure, offering clearer ownership and roll-up visibility. Hyperproof's Scopes enhancement aims to streamline processes without requiring extra manual work.
